name: Crab Roll Hors D'oeuvre
recipeInstructions:
1. Season slightly with your choice of the following ingredients: salt, cream, onion, sherry, pepper, tabasco mustard, Worcestershire sauce.
2. Remove all cartilage from the crabmeat.
3. Gently mix the crab with the cream cheese, taking care not to break the pieces.
4. Shape the mixture into a log and sprinkle with parsley.
5. Chill the log and serve with crackers.
